complaint_text: Hi, my order ORD-1887 arrived damaged and I need help.

reasoning.rationale: Damaged product reported, refund is the quickest resolution.

response.english: Thanks for your complaint. Our decision is: REFUND. Damaged product reported, refund is the quickest resolution.
response.bahasa_malaysia: Terima kasih atas aduan anda. Keputusan kami ialah: REFUND. Sebab: Damaged product reported, refund is the quickest resolution.

context.notes: Missing order ID. Ask user to provide an order ID.

response.english: Thanks for your message. Please share your order ID so we can verify and resolve this quickly.
response.bahasa_malaysia: Terima kasih atas mesej anda. Sila kongsikan ID pesanan anda supaya kami boleh semak dan selesaikan dengan cepat.

complaint_text: Hi, I received my order ORD-1887 but the item is damaged. The dress has a torn seam on the side. I'd like a replacement or refund please.

complaint_text: Brader, barang saya tak sampai lagi la. Dah 2 minggu tracking still processing je. Mana pergi barang saya ni? Order ORD-2041. Kalau tak settle hari ni, I nak refund balik.

reasoning.rationale: Needs manual review due to unclear issue context.
